name: Netflix Cookies
description: Various Netflix cookie types including HD, UHD, TP, and more.
long_description:
🍿 Netflix Cookies (No replacement or warranty)
- HD: Basic quality account
- UHD: Ultra HD support
- Country-Based: Geo-specific access
- TP: 3rd party billing accounts
- EM Specific: Bought mail-based access

name: GPT+ Cookies
description: Fresh and bulk GPT+ cookies, some with replacement.
long_description:
🤖 GPT+ Cookies
- Normal: Regular GPT+ cookie.
- 10d R: Cookie with replacement 10 days.
- 15d R: Cookie with replacement 15 days.

name: Spotify Cookies
description: Mixed and country-based Spotify cookies for bulk use.
long_description:
🎵 Spotify Cookies
- Mixed: Non-region locked Spotify access
- Country-Based: Country-specific premium access

name: Hotstar Cookies
description: Mixed region Hotstar cookies in 10-pack bundles.
long_description:
📺 Hotstar Cookies
- Mixed: General access, works for multiple countries

name: Prime Video Cookies
description: Prime Video cookies available as mixed or country-based.
long_description:
🎥 Prime Video Cookies
- Mixed: General premium cookies
- Country-Based: Targeted geo-region cookies
